title: Uhu
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Uhu''''' was a pair of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They attempted to lay probes called [[Keyhole]] near an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] R&D facility that was attacked by [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s forces. But they were destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] before they could escape and their probes destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
